strategy_params.strategy: SMA200 ±3% Band + Distance Scale 1-3x + RSI>30 Exit

default_backtest.strategy: SMA200 ±3% Band + Distance Scale 1-3x + RSI>30 Exit

comparison_table.strategy: SMA200 ±3% Band + Distance Scale 1-3x + RSI>30 Exit

monte_carlo.strategy: SMA200 ±3% Band + Distance Scale 1-3x + RSI>30 Exit
monte_carlo.method: Block-bootstrap of joint historical segments (index return, ret_0–ret_3, T-bill); listed ETP where available with VIX-linked synthetic daily-reset pre-inception.

levered_pnl_model: Listed 2x/3x ETP daily returns (SPY/SSO/UPRO, same US calendar as the index; implement via UCITS XS2D.L 2x / 3USL.L 3x); VIX-linked synthetic daily-reset before ETP inception. Monte Carlo: Block-bootstrap of joint historical segments (index return, ret_0–ret_3, T-bill); listed ETP where available with VIX-linked synthetic daily-reset pre-inception.
